name: Neferpitou
description: __Nen Type:__ Specialization A cat-humanoid Chimera Ant and the firstborn of the Chimera Ant King's three Royal Guards. Neferpitou is very loyal to the King, just like the rest of the Royal Guards that would sacrifice themselves for him. Neferpitou gets distracted easily, loves to play a lot and that makes them the most curious of the three Royal Guards. Hence their cat-like appearance, Pitou is a cat Chimera Ant who loves to play with their opponents like a cat would with their prey. Despite th

name: Rei Miyamoto
description: __Height:__ 164 cm __Weight:__ 50 kg Classmate and childhood friend of Takashi, they've known each other since kindergarten. When they were little she promised that one day she would marry him. Despite liking Takashi, their relationship was at odds at the beginning of the manga due to his indecisiveness. It was then that she started dating one of his friends, Hisashi, since he wouldn't make a move. As the story progressed they ended up reconciling their relationship. She doesn't find it above he

name: Mihael Keehl
description: Mello is the older of L's two successors raised in Wammy's House, Watari's orphanage for gifted children, in Winchester, England, United Kingdom. Similar to L's fondness for sweets, Mello is often seen eating bars of chocolate. Mello has an excellent mind and that he sometimes lets his emotions get in his way. ~!Instead of working alongside Near to discover Kira after the news of L's death, [Near](https://anilist.co/character/464), Mello refuses, citing an inability to work with Near, to whom he

name: Sara
description: Sara was born in Asura in the Milbotts Region ruled by the Notos Greyrat Family. Her father was a hunter from whom she learned how to use the bow. Now a prodigy for her talent with the bow, she is an A-ranked adventurer and member of the party Counter Arrow. ~!When a horde of monsters attacked her hometown, the Notos family refused to send their soldier, because of that she lost her father, which lead to her hatred of the nobility in general. name: Neji Hyuuga
description: __Height:__ 172 cm __Rank:__ Genin (I); Jonin (II) Neji Hyuuga is a stoic member of [Might Guy](https://anilist.co/character/307)'s Team Guy, consisting of himself, [Rock Lee](https://anilist.co/character/306), and [Tenten](https://anilist.co/character/3710). Neji and Lee have somewhat of a rivalry, much like that of Guy and [Kakashi Hatake](https://anilist.co/character/85). Lee is determined to prove that a "failure" such as himself can defeat a "genius" such as Neji. Neji, however, doesn't see

name: Kirari Momobami
description: Kirari Momobami is the 105th student council president at Hyakkaou Private Academy, and as well as the one responsible for the current hierarchy on the academy.

name: Sniper Kamen
description: Sniper Mask also known as the "White Grim Reaper" ~!After Kuon Shinzaki's "death" her powers were transfered to him. Becoming a God Candidate.!~ ~!His real name is Yuuka Makoto (誠勇火).!~

name: Conan Edogawa
description: **Height:** 174 cm (as Shinichi) **Relatives:** [Yusaku Kudo](https://anilist.co/character/9177) (father) & [Yukiko Kudo](https://anilist.co/character/20372) (mother) At the beginning of the series, Shinichi is a 17-year old student at Teitan High School. He is already well-known as a brilliant young detective, the "Savior of the police force", for solving many difficult cases that the professionals could not. However, while investigating 2 mysterious men, he is spotted and forced to swallow an

name: Nanami Momozono
description: __Species:__ Human / God __Height:__ 162 cm (5'4") A teenage girl whose father ran out on her because of his gambling debts, she was often mocked for her poverty by her classmates. She becomes the local land god after former god Mikage transfers his position as master of the shrine over to Nanami. She begins with very little spiritual power, but works hard at balancing her godly duties with her schoolwork. Nanami is often upset when Tomoe flirts with other women. Tomoe always puts Shiitake mushr

name: Shorter Wong
description: Shorter is the "boss" of Chinatown, a loyal friend to Ash, and a criminal with a heart of gold. Like Ash, Shorter is an unusual "thug" with a deep sense of honor, and a drive to always do the right thing. He'll go to any lengths to protect his loved ones... even when the interests of those closest to him come into irreconcilable conflict. Shorter is clever, resourceful, and as tough as steel. He's equally skilled at brawling, shooting, and sneaking around like a shadowy thief. Shorter can disgui

name: Hyouma Chigiri
description: __Height:__ 177cm (5'10") Hyoma Chigiri is a contender for the Blue Lock Project and member of Team Z. As a young child, he was thought of as a prodigy due to his incredible speed. However, he is now psychologically scarred by a life-changing injury during his first year of high school.

name: Juvia Lockser
description: Juvia made up 1/4th of the Phantom Lord's elite group, Element 4. She was sent by the guild master [Jose](https://anilist.co/character/23844), along with [Sol](https://anilist.co/character/9717), to go and capture [Lucy](https://anilist.co/character/5186) and bring her back to him safely. Her magic seems to deal with water as she is able to control rain and other large bodies of water. In addition, her body seems to be formed from the rain that surrounds her, leaving her intact and able to refor

name: Hikaru Hitachiin
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5'9") Hikaru Hitachiin is a devious and childish first-year student who greatly enjoys toying with his fellow Host Club members Haruhi and Tamaki (whom he often calls, “My Lord”). He and his younger identical twin, Kaoru, are “little devil” type hosts who put on an act of “forbidden brotherly love” (with Hikaru as the seme) to draw in their clients. Unlike Tamaki, the Hitachiin brothers are wholly calculating in their customer relations; however, this is because of their deep
mediaTitles: Ouran Koukou Host Club University Special

name: Kyouko Sakura
description: __Height:__ 156-158 cm __Weapon:__ Spear Kyouko is a veteran magical girl who comes to the city later in the story. Amusingly, she is always seen eating something, even while she is battling. Having grown up in a poor family, she often has to steal food and hates people who waste it, a logic she also applies to Grief Seeds, as she only goes after fully grown witches. Kyouko has been a Puella Magi much longer than the others, and thus is more skillful; she wields a spear which can extend itself,

name: Nate River
description: Near is the younger of [L's](https://anilist.co/character/71/L-Lawliet) two successors raised in Wammy's House—[Watari's](https://anilist.co/character/2179/Quillsh-Wammy) orphanage for gifted children, in Winchester, England. Of the successors, Near is the more level-headed one, able to remain calm and calculated, while the other, [Mello](https://anilist.co/character/463/Mihael-Keehl), is more emotional and quick to act. The two of them share a strong rivalry. Near is very intelligent, although

name: Mitsumi Iwakura
description: First-year high school student who moved to Tokyo from the outskirts of Ishikawa Prefecture near Suzu. Raised a child prodigy, she entered high school at the top of her class; however, she has no athletic ability. Her pure personality unintentionally influences the people around her. She has a younger sister and brother.

name: Takumi Fujiwara
description: __Car:__ Toyota Sprinter Trueno GT-APEX (AE86) (color: High Tech two-tone) Takumi Fujiwara is the son of Bunta Fujiwara, the owner of a tofu shop in his hometown Akina. He rarely shows emotion. His best friend is Itsuki Takeuchi, who is a racing fan. Takumi works part-time at a gas station with Itsuki, along with Iketani, who is a member of the local racing team, the Akina Speed Stars. Takumi has been manipulated subtly by Bunta into developing driving skills, without being fully aware of Bunta'

name: Reg
description: Reg is a robotic being who appears to be a little boy. His actual age, origins, and even name are unknown because he cannot recall anything about his life before his encounter with [Riko](https://anilist.co/character/122443/Riko). He is named after a dog Riko used to have. Having a seemingly artificial body, Reg might be the only being completely immune to the Curse of the Abyss. Because of this, he is sometimes referred to as "The Treasure of the Deep." Reg’s body is extremely durable, even to
mediaTitles: Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul
Made in Abyss: The Golden City of the Scorching Sun

name: Buntarou Mori
description: A transfer student, who after being talked into climbing the school building, discovered a sense of fulfillment upon reaching the top. After which he became interested in rock-climbing. He is a loner who says he doesn't need friends, and seems to have gone through something in the past. He would rather climb a mountain alone than with a partner.

name: Delta
description: __Race:__ Beastkin Delta is a member of Shadow Garden, being fourth of the original Shadow Seven to join the organization after her Demonic Possession was healed by her master [Shadow](https://anilist.co/character/136837/Cid-Kagenou). As the most physically gifted of the Seven, Delta is also often the most destructive and brutal of the group due to her lack of sense and self-control. (Source: To Be a Power in the Shadows! Wiki)

name: Menou
description: The Executioner. A young executioner girl who has exceptional magical talent. She is strongly dedicated to her mission and tries to finish off [Akari](https://anilist.co/character/161696) before her power gets out of hand. She gets close to her targets with friendly manner to grasp their ability before killing them. Her main weapons are short blade and sacred scripture.
mediaTitles: The Executioner and Her Way of Life
The Executioner and Her Way of Life
The Executioner and Her Way of Life

name: Reina Kousaka
description: __Height:__ 158 cm __Instrument:__ Trumpet A girl who graduated from the same junior high school as Kumiko. Influenced by her dad, who is a pro, she has been playing the trumpet since she was little, so she continues at the wind ensemble in high school. She is stoic and cool, and tends to keep herself distanced from other people.

name: Panda
description: __Species:__ Cursed Corpse (varies among 3 personalities) __Occupation:__ Jujutsu Sorcerer, Student __Affiliation:__ Jujutsu High __Grade:__ 2 He is a second-year at Tokyo Prefectural Jujutsu High. As a Metamorphosed Cursed Corpse, he is the best creation of Principal [Masamichi Yaga](https://anilist.co/character/189237/Masamichi-Yaga). He is sentient and has three cores inside the doll body: the youngest brother "Panda", the eldest brother "Gorilla" and a sister.

name: Momiji Souma
description: __Zodiac Animal:__ Rabbit A cute and seemingly happy teenager with a sad family life that he hides behind his cheery demeanor. His endless whining and crying often annoys Kyo. He is older than he looks, much to Tohru's surprise, he is only 1 year younger than Yuki, and Kyo, the same age as Hatsuharu. Momiji is the rabbit of the Zodiac and is the son of one of the richer members of the Soma family. His father is Japanese while Momiji's mother is German. Tohru unwittingly cleans Momiji's father's
